# nicita.cc

> Primary sources for writing by Alexander Nicita.

- Blog index: https://nicita.cc/blog
- RSS feed: https://nicita.cc/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://nicita.cc/sitemap.xml
- LLM full corpus: https://nicita.cc/llms-full.txt
- Structured discovery: https://nicita.cc/discovery.json

## Posts
- N-Dimensional Machines (2026-05-04): https://nicita.cc/blog/n-dimensional-machines
- Knowledge Work After Superintelligent AI (2026-02-09): https://nicita.cc/blog/knowledge-work-after-superintelligent-ai
- Antonym of the Market (2025-08-21): https://nicita.cc/blog/antonym-of-the-market
